mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM ps5_order WHERE status IN ('1', '2', '3', '5')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ps5_order WHERE status IN ('1', '2', '3', '5')

SELECT t.game_id, t.game_name, t.sold_quantity, t.revenue FROM ( SELECT oi.game_id, g.game_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS sold_quantity, SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity) AS revenue FROM ps5_order_item oi INNER JOIN ps5_order o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id AND o.status IN ('1', '2', '3', '5') INNER JOIN ps5_game g ON oi.game_id = g.game_id GROUP BY oi.game_id, g.game_name ) t ORDER BY t.revenue DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT DATE_FORMAT( COALESCE(o.pay_time, o.create_time, o.finish_time), '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS stat_date, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS revenue FROM ps5_order o WHERE o.status IN ('1', '2', '3', '5') AND DATE(COALESCE(o.pay_time, o.create_time, o.finish_time)) BETWEEN #{beginDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(COALESCE(o.pay_time, o.create_time, o.finish_time)) ORDER BY DATE(COALESCE(o.pay_time, o.create_time, o.finish_time))
